name: Ironwood Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
description: Ironwood Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a leading gastrointestinal (GI) healthcare company focused on creating, developing, and commercializing innovative medicines that make a difference for people living with GI diseases. The company is best known for its blockbuster product, LINZESS® (linaclotide), which is a leading treatment for adults with irritable bowel syndrome with constipation (IBS-C) or chronic idiopathic constipation (CIC). Ironwood continues to advance its pipeline of GI therapeutics to address significant unmet medical needs.
